title: FACS Staining of phosphorylated antigens
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"dllb7","text":"This is a protocol for the detection of phosphorylated antigens via flow cytometry without the use of commercially available kits. It is adapted from the publication linked after the description","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"cajmj","text":"Prepare IMDM (complete):","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"44vjf","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d010c","text":"Add to the 500 ml IMDM Bottle:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"95p0q","text":"25 ml fetal bovine serum (final concentration: 5%)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e1480","text":"5 ml L-Glutamine (final concentration 2 mM)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"df38e","text":"500 µl Gentamicin (final concentration 50 µg/ml)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"f62ol","text":"500 µl 2-Mercaptoethanol (final concentraiton 50 µM)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"aj74n","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"c3p1q","text":"Prepare PBS with 5% BSA. Dilute part of it to 0,5%.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5rflc","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6h817","text":"Prepare 1mM Ionomycin stocks in DMSO.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3gvsk","text":"Prepare 10 µg/ml PMA Stocks in DMSO.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"a1tk8","text":"Prepare 8% PFA Solution in 1xPBS.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2epni","text":"Cool methanol to 4 °C. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d0d2c","text":"Prepare ice bath under the fume hood for incubation with methanol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fiu8d","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"aegnq","text":"Cool down the centrifuge.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"2ec0d","text":"Wear gloves and safety goggles while handling 8%PFA and methanol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8vmq","text":"Incubation with methanol only under a fume hood.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"f6sqd","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Pipette 1 ml of single cell suspension in each of 6 FACS-Tubes. Label them accordingly (0 Minutes, 5 Minutes, 15 Minutes, 30 Minutes, 60 Minutes, 120 Minutes). 02:00:00, longest incubation Undetermined, and 5% CO2
Resuspend cell suspension at a concentration of 5*10 6 cells/ml. Incubate for 2 h at 37 °C and 5 %CO 2 . 02:00:00, First Incubation undetermined, IMDM (complete) per Sample Undetermined, and 5% CO2

Incubate the cells for the alotted time. Immediately after incubation take the samples out and add 200 µl 8% PFA (final concentration 1,5% PFA). Incubate at room temperature for 10 minutes. 00:10:00, for each sample undetermined, 8% PFA Undetermined
Centrifuge for 5 minutes at 520 g and 4 °C. Decant supernatant. Resuspend samples in the return flow. 00:05:00, centrifugation Undetermined
Add 1 ml of ice cold methanol. Incubate for 30 minutes on ice. undetermined, Methanol per sample 00:30:00, Incubation on ice Undetermined, on ice

Add 3 ml PBS/0,5% BSA to each sample. Centrifuge for 5 minutes at 520 g and 4 °C. Decant supernatant and Resuspend in 300 µl PBS/5% BSA. undetermined, PBS/5% BSA per sample 00:05:00, centrifugation Undetermined undetermined, PBS/0,5% BSA per sample

Transfer 75 µl of sample into a new FACS-Tube. Add 25 µl antibody mastermix. Example for 10 stainings: %s %s Antigen Dye Clone Volume/Sample Volume in mastermix CD8a PerCP 53-6.7 0.5 5 CD4 APC RM4-5 0.5 5 TCRgd FITC eBioGL3 0.5 5 STAT3P v450 4/P-STAT3 20 200 PBS/5 % BSA 40 Incubate for 30 minutes at room temperature in the dark. undetermined, Mastermix per sample Undetermined 00:30:00, RT in the dark
Add 3 ml PBS/ 0.5% BSA. Centrifuge for 5 Minutes at 520 g and 4 °C. Decant supernatant. undetermined, PBS/0,5% BSA Undetermined 00:05:00, centrifugation
Repeat Step 8. Add 200 µl of PBS/0,5% BSA for measuring. go to step #8 undetermined, PBS/0,5% BSA
